title: Basic Principles of Hedging: How do interest rate futures...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: How do interest rate futures contracts primarily function?

options.text: Difference between spot and futures prices
Interest rate futures can be used for both speculation and hedging

solution: Interest rate futures can be used for both speculation and hedging. They allow market participants to lock in interest rates or benefit from expected changes in interest rates, making them versatile tools for managing interest rate risk.
